Package io.minio

Class Http.RequestBody

java.lang.Object
okhttp3.RequestBody
io.minio.Http.RequestBody
Enclosing class:
Http
public static class Http.RequestBody extends okhttp3.RequestBody
HTTP request body of RandomAccessFile, ByteBuffer or byte array.
